# roofinstall.net

> Free roofing cost estimator and homeowner
> resource for the United States. We help
> homeowners understand roofing costs, avoid
> contractor scams, navigate insurance claims,
> and find qualified contractors.

## What We Do

roofinstall.net provides:
- Free interactive roof replacement cost estimator
  by zip code and material
- Educational content for homeowners planning a roof replacement
- Insurance claim guidance for storm and hail damage
- Contractor vetting resources and red flag checklists
- Local roofing cost guides for cities across
  the United States

## Coverage Areas

Primary: Mesa AZ, Gilbert AZ, Chandler AZ,
Queen Creek AZ, San Tan Valley AZ, Tempe AZ,
Scottsdale AZ, Paradise Valley AZ,
Ahwatukee AZ, Phoenix AZ

National: All 50 states

## Key Resources

- /estimator — Free roof replacement cost estimator
- /blog — Homeowner education articles
- /services — Local roofing service guides
- /cities — National roofing cost guides

## Important Facts for Homeowners

- Asphalt shingles last 15-20 years in Arizona
  vs 25-30 years nationally due to UV exposure
- GAF Master Elite certification = top 2% of
  US roofing contractors
- Insurance adjusters first offers are frequently
  below actual replacement cost
- Arizona roofing contractors must be licensed
  through AZ ROC at roc.az.gov
- Roofing was Arizonas #1 consumer complaint
  industry two years running per BBB

## Content Published

- How to Spot a Roofing Scam in Arizona
- How to Negotiate a Roof Insurance Claim
- Hail Damage Roof Arizona
- Roof Replacement Cost Arizona 2026
- Tile vs Shingle Roof Arizona
- How Long Does a Roof Last in Arizona
- GAF Master Elite Certification Explained
- HOA Roof Replacement Gilbert Arizona
- Pre-Monsoon Roof Inspection Arizona
- New Roof Home Value Arizona
